Name: The Hewitt School
Tagline: The Hewitt School in NYC offers a transformative K-12 private school experience for girls, blending academic rigor with personal growth and a commitment to social responsibility.
City: Upper East Side, New York, US
About: The Hewitt School continues a century-long legacy of advocating for the education of brave, bold women. Our motto, "By Faith and Courage," reflects our deep commitment to nurturing confident and resilient girls and young women.
Philosophy: I could not be more excited to be leading our wonderful school in one of the greatest cities in the world! From the moment that I first walked through the doors of Hewitt, I felt the students’ energy around learning, their excitement to ask questions and share ideas, and the supportive atmosphere that is only possible when families, faculty, and staff partner around the shared goal of educating girls and young women.
Outcomes: The Hewitt School boasts a strong record of graduates attending prestigious universities, including Ivy League institutions. Students consistently excel in Advanced Placement (AP) exams, showcasing their academic preparedness and commitment to excellence.
Admissions: The Hewitt School is a proud member of the Independent Schools Admissions Association of Greater New York (ISAAGNY). Founded in 1965, ISAAGNY aims to ensure orderly, professional, and equitable admissions processes at member schools: we do so by observing a shared admissions timeline, engaging in professional development to hone our collective craft, exchanging resources and best practices, and more.
Quote: Empowering each girl to lead with courage and faith, shaping a future of limitless possibilities.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: The Hewitt School's faculty includes educators with advanced degrees from Ivy League universities and specialized training in girls' education. Teachers are committed to fostering a supportive and challenging academic environment.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The Hewitt School offers comprehensive counseling services and a robust advisory program to support students' emotional and mental health. Wellness initiatives include mindfulness workshops and community-building activities.
Performance.Academic Integration: The Hewitt School offers a diverse curriculum with a strong emphasis on Advanced Placement courses in subjects like calculus and biology. Signature electives include creative writing and digital media studies.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Hewitt graduates boast a high acceptance rate to prestigious universities, including several Ivy League schools. Notable alumni have excelled in fields such as law, medicine, and the arts.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The Hewitt School features state-of-the-art science labs, a modern gymnasium, and a well-equipped theatre. The library offers extensive resources, including digital databases and collaborative study spaces.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress at The Hewitt School is monitored through trimester reports and regular parent-teacher conferences. The school is accredited by NYSAIS, ensuring adherence to high educational standards.
